items.configValue: {"$schema":"http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#","description":"A schema for the content of a generated PDF document.","properties":{"sections":{"description":"An array of sections, each with a title and content.","items":{"properties":{"content":{"description":"The content of the section.","type":"string"},"title":{"description":"The title of the section.","type":"string"}},"required":["title","content"],"type":"object"},"type":"array"},"title":{"description":"The main title of the document.","type":"string"}},"required":["title","sections"],"title":"PDF Content","type":"object"}
